name: ngx-i18n-validator
description: Validates ngx-translate keys in HTML/TS files against locale JSON files ({locale}/{namespace}.json)

ngxI18n.localesPath.description: Path to locale folder relative to workspace root. Must contain {locale}/{namespace}.json files.

ngxI18n.sourceLocale.description: Source locale used to validate keys (e.g. 'es').

ngxI18n.severity.description: Diagnostic severity for missing i18n keys.

commands.title: ngx-i18n: Create missing key in all locales
